message:
🐛 Portal all cluster filter dropdowns to fix overflow clipping (#333)

All 23 card cluster filter dropdowns were rendered with absolute
positioning inside card containers that use overflow-auto, causing
the dropdown to be clipped/hidden behind the card boundary.

Changes:
- Add clusterFilterBtnRef and dropdownStyle to useCardFilters and
  useChartFilters hooks for portal positioning
- Fix click-outside handlers to check both container and portaled
  dropdown refs (prevents false close on dropdown click)
- Convert CardClusterFilter shared component to use createPortal
- Convert all 22 inline card dropdowns to use createPortal with
  fixed positioning
- Add onMouseDown stopPropagation to portaled dropdowns
- Clean up ClusterMetrics to use hook-provided portal values
- Add useDropdownPortal shared hook for standalone filter cards

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
